_purpose: Single source of truth mapping deployment profile -> (CMake preset, CAAS profile, scoped capability set). Consumed by ci/profile_manifest.py (Python loader), ci/check_profile_smoke.sh (build smoke), ci/check_profile_consistency.py (cross-references CMakePresets.json and ci/caas_runner.py PROFILES), and the integration docs.
_invariants: Every profile MUST have a `cmake_preset` that exists in CMakePresets.json `configurePresets[*].name`.
If `caas_profile` is set it MUST exist in ci/caas_runner.py PROFILES.
Module names match the SECP256K1_BUILD_* CMake option naming (without the prefix). Example: 'MUSIG2' maps to SECP256K1_BUILD_MUSIG2.

bitcoin-core.title: Bitcoin Core Backend
bitcoin-core.description: Minimal footprint for Bitcoin Core fork integration. Drops everything Core does not need.
bitcoin-core.notes: Built without LTO so size is dominated by .text. Pippenger is kept because Core's batch verify uses it. BIP-324 is on because Core v25+ uses it for P2P transport.

litecoin.title: Litecoin Core Backend
litecoin.description: Minimal footprint for Litecoin Core fork. Taproot enabled (activated May 2023). No BIP-324 (LTC P2P is v1 only).
litecoin.notes: Borrows the Bitcoin Core CAAS profile because the shim surface and signing paths are identical. LTC_SP is its own module (chain-specific Silent Payments) and stays OFF in the Core-backend variant.

dogecoin.title: Dogecoin Core Backend
dogecoin.description: Minimal footprint for Dogecoin Core. ECDSA only (DOGE has no Taproot, no MuSig2, no BIP-324).
dogecoin.notes: Smallest x86-64 footprint among the chain-specific profiles.

bch-wallet.title: BCH Wallet (RPA + HD)
bch-wallet.description: BCH with RPA scanning, HD wallet (BIP-32/39), ECIES. No FROST/ZK. Pippenger ON for batch ops.
bch-wallet.notes: Inherits from base-coin so BIP-352 / LTC-SP stay off (BCH has its own RPA scheme via SECP256K1_BUILD_BCH). The bchn-compat CAAS profile covers BCHN legacy Schnorr shim.

wallet.title: Wallet Build (BIP-352 + adaptor + HD)
wallet.description: Full wallet: BIP-32/39, BIP-352 Silent Payments, adaptor sigs, ECIES, MuSig2.
wallet.notes: LTC_SP defaults to ON in this preset because BIP352 is ON; the chain-coin profiles explicitly turn LTC_SP off via base-coin.

audit.title: Full Audit Build
audit.description: All optional modules enabled — matches ci_local.sh --full and the canonical CAAS pipeline.
audit.notes: Reference build used by every audit gate in CI; deliberately broad.

_consistency_notes: Profiles 'bitcoin-core', 'litecoin', and 'dogecoin' all map to the SAME CAAS profile (bitcoin-core-backend). That is correct: the audit scope (shim parity + CPU signing) is identical across them; only the build-flag set differs.
Profile 'bch-wallet' is the only profile that exercises SECP256K1_BUILD_BCH=ON; the bchn-compat CAAS profile covers the BCHN legacy-Schnorr shim that ships with that build.
The 'wallet' profile is the only deployment profile with LTC_SP=ON; the chain-coin profiles inherit base-coin which forces LTC_SP=OFF (LTC_SP requires BIP352).
